title: 1.1: Tests that CreateTestRun returns response with ReferenceID and validates ConfigOverride.AggregationPeriod when sending JSON request
1.3: Tests that CreateTestRun returns nil response and formatted error when server responds with 403 status
1.4: Tests that CreateTestRun retry mechanism makes exactly 3 attempts with consistent idempotency key when server returns 500 errors
2.1: Places the test for basic test run creation in cloudapi/api_test.go or cloudapi/ directory
2.2: Places the test for archive file attachment in cloudapi/api_test.go or cloudapi/ directory
2.3: Places the test for authorization failure handling in cloudapi/api_test.go or cloudapi/ directory
2.4: Places the test for retry mechanism in cloudapi/api_test.go or cloudapi/ directory
3.1: All tests use Go's testing package with func(t *testing.T) signature
3.2: All tests use httptest.NewServer with http.HandlerFunc for mock HTTP server creation
3.3: All tests are implemented as subtests using t.Run with descriptive string names within TestCreateTestRun
3.4: All tests use testify package assert or require functions for assertions
4.1: Follows pattern of calling t.Parallel() at the beginning of each subtest for concurrent execution
4.2: Follows pattern of calling defer server.Close() immediately after httptest.NewServer creation
4.3: Follows pattern of creating client using NewClient with testutils.NewLogger(t) as first parameter
4.4: Follows pattern of using types.Duration for parsing and asserting time duration values from ConfigOverride
